name: icon_hint
description: The consumable booster identity: a premium glass lightbulb hint token with a warm glowing filament and ONE large golden four-point star spark at its top, green coiled screw base. Single object, glossy but restrained (no species, no letters, no small particles).

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
